eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Midway Islands, US Pacific Islands; at 3:52 PM on JUN 26, 2026 Effective until 4:07 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test conducted by the FEMA IPAWS Technical Support Services. No action is required. AS-BJM
